trivia: The stretched 7X is Dassault's ultra-long-range flagship: three engines, 11,900 km of range and the ability to use short runways big jets cannot. It links city pairs almost nothing else connects.
Trijet plus extreme range equals gloriously strange tracks: watch where your 8X catches actually go.
funFacts: Can land at steep, short fields like London City.
